description: Style Noteshorts are the coolest bottoms to wear in the current season - and perhaps the most versatile too. Slip into this pair when on a long journey, a casual day at home or at the gym. Pair them with sports shoes or flip flops to suit the occasion.Product DetailsGrey shorts with an elasticated waist that has drawstrings inside, has two side pockets with patented adidas 3-Stripes in shades of blue running along the side seams, embroidered brand logo on the left leg and is engineered with Climalite technologyMaterial and Care70% Cotton and 30% PolyesterMachine wash at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not soak, tumble dry or bleachFlat dry in shadeCool iron; do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size M
